headline: 3 Berkshire Stocks Under $30 and 2 Under $30 Greg Abel May Buy
summary: Warren Buffett built Berkshire Hathaway by paying reasonable prices for durable cash flows, and three of his current bets still trade below $30 a share. With Greg Abel sitting on a record cash pile, the sub-$30 aisle is where value hunters are scanning for the kind of brand-heavy, cash-generative franchises Omaha tends to favor when ... 3 Berkshire Stocks Under $30 and 2 Under $30 Greg Abel May Buy

headline: Snackables Launch Tests Kraft Heinz Efforts To Refresh Lunchables Growth
summary: Lunchables, owned by Kraft Heinz, has launched new "Snackables" double snack packs designed for splitting and sharing. The product extends the brand's on the go lineup with shareable, bite sized options aimed at snackers looking for convenience. Kraft Heinz (NasdaqGS:KHC) is rolling out Snackables at a time when its stock trades around $23.26 and has seen mixed recent returns, including a 3.7% gain over the past week and a 0.9% move over the past month. Over longer horizons, the share price...

headline: Kraft Heinz Celebrates 250 Years of Summer Cookouts with "The United Tastes of America"
summary: CHICAGO, May 12, 2026--As America approaches its 250th anniversary, The Kraft Heinz Company is marking the moment the only way it knows how: by bringing people together over food. Today, as part of its America250 sponsorship, the company unveils "The United Tastes of America", its largest portfolio campaign in history, celebrating the role its iconic brands have played in one of America’s favorite pastimes: summer cookouts. headline: Kraft Heinz’s biggest portfolio campaign to date celebrates America250
summary: The CPG giant is uniting several of its top brands to capitalize on cookout season as it ramps up marketing spend to support its turnaround.
